narrative:
Symmes Twp. township has 11,462 registered voters, with 56.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.6%, a clear Republican lean of 10.4 percentage points.
